corrections.correct:
ἐπὶ Ἰσραήλ. ²³Καὶ μετὰ πᾶσαν τὴν
πρᾶξιν ταύτην
corrections.note: The verse-23 incipit ‘Καὶ μετὰ πᾶσαν τὴν’ at the end of line 1 was dropped.
Spurious τ inserted; the printed name is Ἰωσείαν (Josiah), not Ἰωστείαν.
Same spurious τ; should be Ἰωσείαν.
Word is προκαθήμενοι (those presiding), not προκείμενοι.
B reads αἰεὶ (older form); apparatus records αει as A’s variant. Body was normalized toward A.
B reads βύβλῳ (υ); apparatus records βιβλω as A’s variant.
B reads βυβλίῳ (υ); apparatus records τη βιβλω as A’s variant.
α dropped between the second δ and ο.
ι should be υ; this is the lemma form for A’s variant on βύβλῳ.
A’s reading is Ιωαχαζ (Jehoahaz); the α between ω and χ was dropped.

uncertain.note: Image appears to print a longer form (Μεγαδδαοῦς or Μαγεδδαούς) rather than ‘Μεγαδδώς’; could not verify with full confidence at this resolution.
Existing transcription omits the acute on Ἰωσείας; image appears accented but glyph is small.
Image appears to show Ἰερουσαλὴμ with grave; existing omits the accent.

notes: Body text was repeatedly normalized toward A’s readings (αει, βιβλω, βιβλιω) where Swete prints B’s older spellings (αἰεί, βύβλῳ, βυβλίῳ). The apparatus then loses its referent. Recommend re-checking other Esdras pages for the same systematic drift.
